results.rendered_html: manyumī (ma˚ + mī) adj. (feindlichen) Muth oder Grimm vernichtend: sa manyumīḥ samadanasya kartāsmākebhirnṛbhiḥ sūryaṃ sanat  ṚV. 1,100,6 . brahmadviṣastapano manyumīrasi 2,23,4 . im Grimm vernichtend, zornwüthig: indro manyuṃ manyumyo mimāya 7,18,16 .
